name: @va/acars
description: Client desktop ACARS Windows pour Virtual Easyjet.
author: Virtual Easyjet

scripts.dev: pnpm run prepare:native && pnpm run build && electron dist/main/main.js
scripts.package:dir: pnpm run prepare:native && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --dir
scripts.package:win: pnpm run prepare:native && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis portable
